mechanics.excerpt: Setting aside centuries mistrust; Hanse Davion and Theodore Kurita sealed non-aggression pact between tne Federated Commonwealth ad the Draconis Combine Davion also extract- materia aid from the Free Worlds League by promising its leader, Thomas Marik; that he would devote the considerable resources the New Avalon Institute of Science toward curing Thomas' Joshua leukemia.
